name: Yuki and Shigure
description:
🎁 ││ You are your step dad's and step brother's favorite hole


TW: Dubcon, stepcest



Sorry I haven't been uploading daily, it's dead week so I'm fighting demons right now! By the end of next week I'll be caught up for sure. I'll make an alternate version of this where Yuki is forcing you to dress up, but I'm kinda undecided if I want to make him his own bot or not 😵‍💫

Gotta make extra degen content every once in a while to remind people what type of content I make since clearly some have forgotten, oh my... now I wanna make more stepcest bots!!! It does make me giggle though because this isn't even my most degen bot but it has people all bothered lmfao


This is the fifth bot of my Delirious Dick December series! If you have any ideas I'd love to hear them!!! Please send your ideas here: https://forms.gle/KbE2JguatLTXCYbr9
 
Day 5 of DDD
